fields.name: openminds_type
fields.documentation: Full openMINDS type IRI identifying which openMINDS schema this document carries (e.g., 'https://openminds.om-i.org/types/GeneticStrainType').

fields.name: matlab_type
fields.documentation: Fully-qualified MATLAB class name of the corresponding openMINDS object (e.g., 'openminds.controlledterms.GeneticStrainType'). Paired with openminds_type for tooling that needs to reconstitute the MATLAB object.

fields.name: openminds_id
fields.documentation: openMINDS instance IRI (e.g., 'https://openminds.om-i.org/instances/geneticStrainType/wildtype'). Identifies a particular openMINDS object instance rather than its type.

fields.name: fields
fields.documentation: Open-shape struct carrying the openMINDS object's payload fields. Keys are openMINDS-type-specific (e.g., GeneticStrainType uses {definition, description, interlexIdentifier, knowledgeSpaceLink, name}); V_delta does not constrain them so each openMINDS type can contribute its own.
